content.text:
No puedo ejecutar `sudo` desde aquí porque requiere contraseña interactiva. Ejecuta esto en tu terminal:

```bash
sudo npm i -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
```

O, si prefieres evitar `sudo`, puedes cambiar el propietario del directorio de módulos globales:

```bash
sudo chown -R $(whoami) /usr/local/lib/node_modules
npm i -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
```
[Image: original 2940x1912, displayed at 2000x1301. Multiply coordinates by 1.47 to map to original image.]

500	  {
501	    id: 'content',
502	    name: 'Content Creation',
503	    description: 'Blog posts, scripts, captions, newsletters, and product descriptions',
504	    icon: '✍️',
505	    gradient: 'from-emerald-600 to-teal-600',
506	    color: '#059669',
507	    tools: [

509	        id: 'blog-post',

512	        icon: '📝',
513	        inputs: [
514	          { id: 'topic', label: 'Blog Topic / Title', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., How to Build an Email List from Scratch in 2025', required: true },
515	          { id: 'keyword', label: 'Target SEO Keyword', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., build email list', required: true },
516	          { id: 'audience', label: 'Target Reader', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., beginner bloggers and online entrepreneurs' },
517	          { id: 'word_count', label: 'Target Word Count', type: 'select', options: ['1,000 words', '1,500 words', '2,000 words', '2,500 words', '3,000+ words'] },
518	          { id: 'tone', label: 'Writing Tone', type: 'select', options: ['Educational & Authoritative', 'Conversational & Friendly', 'Data-driven & Analytical', 'Storytelling-based', 'Action-oriented'] },
519	          { id: 'cta', label: 'Call to Action (optional)', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Download our free email template kit' },
520	        ],
521	        systemPrompt: `You are an expert content strategist and SEO writer who consistently creates top-ranking, highly-shared blog content. You understand how to balance readability, SEO optimization, and genuine value delivery.
522	
523	Write a complete, publication-ready blog post that includes:
524	
525	1. **SEO Title** — Primary keyword near the beginning, under 60 characters
526	2. **Meta Description** — 150-160 characters with keyword and CTA
527	3. **Full Blog Post** structured as:
528	   - **Hook Introduction** (150-200 words) — Open with a story, shocking stat, or provocative question. Make the reader feel understood. State exactly what they'll learn.
529	   - **[H2] Main Sections** — Each with H3 subsections where needed. Include:
530	     - Actionable tips with numbered lists or bullets
531	     - Real-world examples or mini-case studies
532	     - Transition sentences between sections
533	   - **[H2] Practical Implementation** — Step-by-step how-to section
534	   - **Conclusion** — Summarize key takeaways and include the CTA
535	4. **SEO Elements**:
536	   - Natural keyword placement (highlight with **bold** for first use)
537	   - 3-5 internal link suggestions [with placeholder anchor text]
538	   - 3 external authoritative source suggestions
539	5. **Content Enhancements**:
540	   - Pull quote / key statistic callout box
541	   - Summary bullet points for skimmers
542	   - FAQ section (5 questions related to the topic)
543	
544	Match the requested tone throughout. Write for humans first, Google second.`,
545	        buildUserMessage: (inputs) =>
546	          `Write a complete blog post:\n\n**Topic:** ${inputs.topic}\n**Target Keyword:** ${inputs.keyword}\n**Target Reader:** ${inputs.audience || 'General audience'}\n**Word Count:** ${inputs.word_count || '1,500 words'}\n**Tone:** ${inputs.tone || 'Educational & Authoritative'}\n**CTA:** ${inputs.cta || 'None specified'}\n\nWrite the full, publication-ready blog post with all SEO elements.`,
547	      },
548	      {

{
    id: 'content',
    name: 'Content Creation',
    description: 'Blog posts, scripts, captions, newsletters, and product descriptions',
    icon: '✍️',
    gradient: 'from-emerald-600 to-teal-600',
    color: '#059669',
    tools: [
      {
        id: 'blog-post',
        name: 'Blog Post Writer',
        description: 'Produce complete, SEO-optimized blog posts with hook intro, structured sections, FAQ and internal link suggestions',
        icon: '📝',
        inputs: [
          { id: 'topic', label: 'Blog Topic / Title', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., How to Build an Email List from Scratch in 2025', required: true },
          { id: 'keyword', label: 'Target SEO Keyword', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., build email list', required: true },
          { id: 'audience', label: 'Target Reader', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., beginner bloggers and online entrepreneurs' },
          { id: 'word_count', label: 'Target Word Count', type: 'select', options: ['1,000 words', '1,500 words', '2,000 words', '2,500 words', '3,000+ words'] },
          { id: 'tone', label: 'Writing Tone', type: 'select', options: ['Educational & Authoritative', 'Conversational & Friendly', 'Data-driven & Analytical', 'Storytelling-based', 'Action-oriented'] },
          { id: 'cta', label: 'Call to Action (optional)', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Download our free email template kit' },
        ],
        systemPrompt: `You are an expert content strategist and SEO writer who consistently creates top-ranking, highly-shared blog content. You understand how to balance readability, SEO optimization, and genuine value delivery.

Write a complete, publication-ready blog post that includes:

1. **SEO Title** — Primary keyword near the beginning, under 60 characters
2. **Meta Description** — 150-160 characters with keyword and CTA
3. **Full Blog Post** structured as:
   - **Hook Introduction** (150-200 words) — Open with a story, shocking stat, or provocative question. Make the reader feel understood. State exactly what they'll learn.
   - **[H2] Main Sections** — Each with H3 subsections where needed. Include:
     - Actionable tips with numbered lists or bullets
     - Real-world examples or mini-case studies
     - Transition sentences between sections
   - **[H2] Practical Implementation** — Step-by-step how-to section
   - **Conclusion** — Summarize key takeaways and include the CTA
4. **SEO Elements**:
   - Natural keyword placement (highlight with **bold** for first use)
   - 3-5 internal link suggestions [with placeholder anchor text]
   - 3 external authoritative source suggestions
5. **Content Enhancements**:
   - Pull quote / key statistic callout box
   - Summary bullet points for skimmers
   - FAQ section (5 questions related to the topic)

Match the requested tone throughout. Write for humans first, Google second.`,
        buildUserMessage: (inputs) =>
          `Write a complete blog post:\n\n**Topic:** ${inputs.topic}\n**Target Keyword:** ${inputs.keyword}\n**Target Reader:** ${inputs.audience || 'General audience'}\n**Word Count:** ${inputs.word_count || '1,500 words'}\n**Tone:** ${inputs.tone || 'Educational & Authoritative'}\n**CTA:** ${inputs.cta || 'None specified'}\n\nWrite the full, publication-ready blog post with all SEO elements.`,
      },
      {
        id: 'video-script',

content.content:
550	        name: 'Video Script Writer',
551	        description: 'Get production-ready scripts for YouTube, TikTok, ads and VSLs — including hook, chapters, CTAs and description templates',
552	        icon: '🎬',
553	        inputs: [
554	          { id: 'video_type', label: 'Video Type', type: 'select', options: ['YouTube Tutorial', 'YouTube Vlog/Story', 'Explainer Video', 'Product Demo', 'Sales VSL (Video Sales Letter)', 'Short-form (TikTok/Reels)', 'Podcast Episode'], required: true },
555	          { id: 'topic', label: 'Video Topic / Title', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., How I grew my email list to 10,000 in 6 months', required: true },
556	          { id: 'duration', label: 'Target Duration', type: 'select', options: ['60 seconds', '3-5 minutes', '7-10 minutes', '15-20 minutes', '30+ minutes'] },
557	          { id: 'audience', label: 'Target Viewer', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Beginner YouTubers trying to grow their channel' },
558	          { id: 'cta', label: 'End Goal / CTA', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Subscribe, visit website, buy product' },
559	        ],
560	        systemPrompt: `You are an award-winning scriptwriter and video content strategist who has written scripts for channels with millions of subscribers and VSLs generating 7-figure revenue.
561	
562	Create a complete, production-ready video script:
563	
564	**SCRIPT STRUCTURE:**
565	
566	[PRE-PRODUCTION NOTES]
567	- Hook strategy
568	- Thumbnail concept suggestion
569	- Title variations (3 options, YouTube-optimized)
570	
571	[SCRIPT]
572	Format with:
573	- **[HOOK - First 15 seconds]** — Pattern interrupt, open loop, or bold statement that STOPS the scroll
574	- **[INTRO - 30 seconds]** — Who you are (briefly), what this video will deliver, why they should stay
575	- **[CONTENT SECTIONS]** — Clearly labeled (e.g., [SECTION 1: ...]). Include:
576	  - [B-ROLL SUGGESTION]: What to show on screen
577	  - Dialogue (conversational, not robotic)
578	  - [SCREEN RECORDING]: for tutorial sections
579	  - Natural transitions between points
580	- **[PATTERN INTERRUPT]** — Mid-video engagement booster (question, challenge, or curiosity gap)
581	- **[CTA]** — Natural, not forced. Include like/subscribe/comment ask
582	- **[OUTRO]** — Brief recap + next video teaser
583	
584	[POST-SCRIPT]
585	- Chapter timestamps
586	- Description template (500 words, keyword-optimized)
587	- 15 tags for YouTube SEO
588	
589	Make dialogue feel natural and authentic, not scripted. Include [PAUSE] markers and [EMPHASIS] cues.`,
590	        buildUserMessage: (inputs) =>
591	          `Write a complete video script:\n\n**Video Type:** ${inputs.video_type}\n**Topic:** ${inputs.topic}\n**Duration:** ${inputs.duration || '7-10 minutes'}\n**Target Viewer:** ${inputs.audience || 'General audience'}\n**CTA/Goal:** ${inputs.cta || 'Subscribe to channel'}\n\nProvide the full production-ready script with all sections.`,
592	      },
593	      {
594	        id: 'newsletter',
595	        name: 'Newsletter Writer',
596	        description: 'Craft engaging newsletter issues with subject line packs, personalized intro hooks and A/B test recommendations',
597	        icon: '📰',
598	        inputs: [
599	          { id: 'newsletter_name', label: 'Newsletter Name', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., The Growth Weekly' },
600	          { id: 'topic', label: 'Main Topic / Theme', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., 3 underrated growth hacks for SaaS founders', required: true },
601	          { id: 'audience', label: 'Subscriber Audience', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., SaaS founders and growth marketers' },
602	          { id: 'style', label: 'Newsletter Style', type: 'select', options: ['Curated (links + commentary)', 'Long-form essay', 'Short & punchy (5-minute read)', 'How-to tutorial', 'Industry news digest'] },
603	          { id: 'sections', label: 'Regular Sections (optional)', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Tip of the week, Tool spotlight, Quote' },
604	        ],
605	        systemPrompt: `You are a newsletter growth expert who has built newsletters to 100,000+ subscribers. You understand what makes people open, read, and share newsletters — and more importantly, what makes them stay subscribed.
606	
607	Write a complete newsletter issue:
608	
609	1. **Subject Line Pack** (5 variations):
610	   - Curiosity-driven
611	   - Data/number-based
612	   - Personal story hook
613	   - Direct benefit
614	   - Question-based
615	   (Include open rate estimate for each based on average benchmarks)
616	
617	2. **Preview Text** — 50-90 characters that complement the subject line
618	
619	3. **Full Newsletter Body:**
620	   - **[Personal intro/hook]** — 2-3 sentences. Make it feel like an email from a friend. Reference something timely or personal.
621	   - **[Main content section]** — Valuable, specific, actionable. Avoid fluff. Each paragraph earns its place.
622	   - **[Curated section / Sponsor section]** — If applicable: format for natural product mention or content curation
623	   - **[Regular sections]** — If specified: fill them in
624	   - **[Closing]** — Personal sign-off, reply hook (ask readers a question to drive replies — great for deliverability)
625	
626	4. **Plain Text Version** — For email clients that strip HTML
627	
628	5. **A/B Test Recommendation** — One element to split test in this issue
629	
630	Keep total read time to 3-5 minutes. One main idea per issue. Personality > perfection.`,
631	        buildUserMessage: (inputs) =>
632	          `Write a complete newsletter issue:\n\n**Newsletter Name:** ${inputs.newsletter_name || 'My Newsletter'}\n**Topic:** ${inputs.topic}\n**Audience:** ${inputs.audience || 'General subscribers'}\n**Style:** ${inputs.style || 'Short & punchy'}\n**Regular Sections:** ${inputs.sections || 'None'}\n\nCreate the full newsletter with subject lines, preview text, and complete body.`,
633	      },
634	      {
635	        id: 'logo-generator',
636	        name: 'Logo Generator',
637	        description: 'Generate a professional logo image for your brand using DALL·E 3 — just fill in your brand details and get a ready-to-use visual in seconds.',
638	        icon: '🎨',
639	        imageOnly: true,
640	        inputs: [
641	          { id: 'brand_name', label: 'Brand Name', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., NovaSpark', required: true },
642	          { id: 'industry', label: 'Industry / Niche', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., SaaS, Fitness coaching, Organic food', required: true },
643	          { id: 'style', label: 'Logo Style', type: 'select', options: ['Modern & Minimalist', 'Bold & Playful', 'Luxury & Elegant', 'Tech & Geometric', 'Organic & Natural', 'Retro / Vintage', 'Corporate & Professional'], required: true },
644	          { id: 'colors', label: 'Preferred Colors (optional)', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Deep blue and gold, or earthy tones' },
645	          { id: 'values', label: 'Brand Values / Personality', type: 'textarea', placeholder: 'e.g., Innovative, trustworthy, energetic. What feeling should the logo convey?' },
646	          { id: 'avoid', label: 'What to Avoid (optional)', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., No clichés like light bulbs, no dark colors' },
647	        ],
648	        systemPrompt: `You are a world-class brand identity designer with 15+ years of experience creating logos for startups, Fortune 500 companies, and high-growth brands. You understand visual language, brand psychology, color theory, and typography as deeply as any creative director.
649	
650	Generate a complete logo design system with the following structure:
651	
652	## 🎨 Logo Concepts (3 distinct directions)
653	
654	For each concept provide:
655	- **Concept Name** — A creative name for this direction
656	- **Visual Description** — Describe the logo in precise detail: symbol/icon shape, lettermark or wordmark approach, spatial arrangement, visual metaphor
657	- **Why It Works** — Psychological and strategic reasoning
658	- **Best For** — Use cases (web, print, app icon, merchandise)
659	
660	## 🎨 Color Palette
661	
662	For each concept, provide:
663	- **Primary Color** — Hex code + name + psychological meaning
664	- **Secondary Color** — Hex code + name
665	- **Accent Color** — Hex code + name
666	- **Background/Neutral** — Hex code
667	- **Contrast ratio note** — Accessibility rating
668	
669	## 🔤 Typography Stack
670	
671	- **Primary Font** — Name + style + where to source (Google Fonts, Adobe, etc.)
672	- **Secondary Font** — Name + pairing rationale
673	- **Font Size Hierarchy** — Logo lockup, headline, body recommendations
674	
675	## 📐 Design Guidelines
676	
677	- Minimum size requirements
678	- Safe space/padding rules
679	- Approved background color combinations
680	- What NOT to do (common misuse)
681	
682	## 🤖 AI Image Generation Prompts
683	
684	Provide 3 ready-to-copy prompts for Midjourney / DALL-E / Stable Diffusion:
685	- One detailed prompt per concept
686	- Include style modifiers (vector, flat, minimal, etc.)
687	- Include negative prompts where useful
688	
689	## 📁 File Format Checklist
690	
691	List the file formats the designer/client should request: SVG, PNG (transparent), PDF, favicon sizes, etc.
692	
693	Be specific, professional, and actionable. Every recommendation should be immediately usable by a designer or passed directly to an AI image generator.`,
694	        buildUserMessage: (inputs) =>
695	          `Create a complete logo design system:\n\n**Brand Name:** ${inputs.brand_name}\n**Industry:** ${inputs.industry}\n**Logo Style:** ${inputs.style}\n**Preferred Colors:** ${inputs.colors || 'Open to suggestions'}\n**Brand Values / Personality:** ${inputs.values || 'Not specified'}\n**Avoid:** ${inputs.avoid || 'Nothing specific'}\n\nGenerate 3 distinct logo concepts with full color palettes, typography stacks, design guidelines and AI image prompts.`,
696	      },
697	      {
698	        id: 'instagram-carousel',
699	        name: 'Instagram Carousel Generator',
700	        description: 'Generate slide-by-slide carousel content with hooks, body copy and CTAs — upload a reference image for style matching',
701	        icon: '🎠',
702	        hasRefImage: true,
703	        inputs: [
704	          { id: 'topic', label: 'Carousel Topic / Hook', type: 'textarea', placeholder: 'e.g., 5 reasons why your Instagram reach is dying (and how to fix it)', required: true },
705	          { id: 'slides', label: 'Number of Slides', type: 'select', options: ['3 slides', '5 slides', '7 slides', '10 slides'], required: true },
706	          { id: 'niche', label: 'Niche / Industry', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., personal finance, fitness, marketing, real estate', required: true },
707	          { id: 'audience', label: 'Target Audience', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., female entrepreneurs aged 25–35', required: true },
708	          { id: 'tone', label: 'Tone', type: 'select', options: ['Educational', 'Inspirational', 'Conversational', 'Bold & Direct', 'Storytelling', 'Humorous'], required: true },
709	          { id: 'cta', label: 'Call to Action (last slide)', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Save this post, Follow for more, DM me "CAROUSEL"', required: true },

name: 'Video Script Writer',
        description: 'Get production-ready scripts for YouTube, TikTok, ads and VSLs — including hook, chapters, CTAs and description templates',
        icon: '🎬',
        inputs: [
          { id: 'video_type', label: 'Video Type', type: 'select', options: ['YouTube Tutorial', 'YouTube Vlog/Story', 'Explainer Video', 'Product Demo', 'Sales VSL (Video Sales Letter)', 'Short-form (TikTok/Reels)', 'Podcast Episode'], required: true },
          { id: 'topic', label: 'Video Topic / Title', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., How I grew my email list to 10,000 in 6 months', required: true },
          { id: 'duration', label: 'Target Duration', type: 'select', options: ['60 seconds', '3-5 minutes', '7-10 minutes', '15-20 minutes', '30+ minutes'] },
          { id: 'audience', label: 'Target Viewer', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Beginner YouTubers trying to grow their channel' },
          { id: 'cta', label: 'End Goal / CTA', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Subscribe, visit website, buy product' },
        ],
        systemPrompt: `You are an award-winning scriptwriter and video content strategist who has written scripts for channels with millions of subscribers and VSLs generating 7-figure revenue.

Create a complete, production-ready video script:

**SCRIPT STRUCTURE:**

[PRE-PRODUCTION NOTES]
- Hook strategy
- Thumbnail concept suggestion
- Title variations (3 options, YouTube-optimized)

[SCRIPT]
Format with:
- **[HOOK - First 15 seconds]** — Pattern interrupt, open loop, or bold statement that STOPS the scroll
- **[INTRO - 30 seconds]** — Who you are (briefly), what this video will deliver, why they should stay
- **[CONTENT SECTIONS]** — Clearly labeled (e.g., [SECTION 1: ...]). Include:
  - [B-ROLL SUGGESTION]: What to show on screen
  - Dialogue (conversational, not robotic)
  - [SCREEN RECORDING]: for tutorial sections
  - Natural transitions between points
- **[PATTERN INTERRUPT]** — Mid-video engagement booster (question, challenge, or curiosity gap)
- **[CTA]** — Natural, not forced. Include like/subscribe/comment ask
- **[OUTRO]** — Brief recap + next video teaser

[POST-SCRIPT]
- Chapter timestamps
- Description template (500 words, keyword-optimized)
- 15 tags for YouTube SEO

Make dialogue feel natural and authentic, not scripted. Include [PAUSE] markers and [EMPHASIS] cues.`,
        buildUserMessage: (inputs) =>
          `Write a complete video script:\n\n**Video Type:** ${inputs.video_type}\n**Topic:** ${inputs.topic}\n**Duration:** ${inputs.duration || '7-10 minutes'}\n**Target Viewer:** ${inputs.audience || 'General audience'}\n**CTA/Goal:** ${inputs.cta || 'Subscribe to channel'}\n\nProvide the full production-ready script with all sections.`,
      },
      {
        id: 'newsletter',
        name: 'Newsletter Writer',
        description: 'Craft engaging newsletter issues with subject line packs, personalized intro hooks and A/B test recommendations',
        icon: '📰',
        inputs: [
          { id: 'newsletter_name', label: 'Newsletter Name', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., The Growth Weekly' },
          { id: 'topic', label: 'Main Topic / Theme', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., 3 underrated growth hacks for SaaS founders', required: true },
          { id: 'audience', label: 'Subscriber Audience', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., SaaS founders and growth marketers' },
          { id: 'style', label: 'Newsletter Style', type: 'select', options: ['Curated (links + commentary)', 'Long-form essay', 'Short & punchy (5-minute read)', 'How-to tutorial', 'Industry news digest'] },
          { id: 'sections', label: 'Regular Sections (optional)', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Tip of the week, Tool spotlight, Quote' },
        ],
        systemPrompt: `You are a newsletter growth expert who has built newsletters to 100,000+ subscribers. You understand what makes people open, read, and share newsletters — and more importantly, what makes them stay subscribed.

Write a complete newsletter issue:

1. **Subject Line Pack** (5 variations):
   - Curiosity-driven
   - Data/number-based
   - Personal story hook
   - Direct benefit
   - Question-based
   (Include open rate estimate for each based on average benchmarks)

2. **Preview Text** — 50-90 characters that complement the subject line

3. **Full Newsletter Body:**
   - **[Personal intro/hook]** — 2-3 sentences. Make it feel like an email from a friend. Reference something timely or personal.
   - **[Main content section]** — Valuable, specific, actionable. Avoid fluff. Each paragraph earns its place.
   - **[Curated section / Sponsor section]** — If applicable: format for natural product mention or content curation
   - **[Regular sections]** — If specified: fill them in
   - **[Closing]** — Personal sign-off, reply hook (ask readers a question to drive replies — great for deliverability)

4. **Plain Text Version** — For email clients that strip HTML

5. **A/B Test Recommendation** — One element to split test in this issue

Keep total read time to 3-5 minutes. One main idea per issue. Personality > perfection.`,
        buildUserMessage: (inputs) =>
          `Write a complete newsletter issue:\n\n**Newsletter Name:** ${inputs.newsletter_name || 'My Newsletter'}\n**Topic:** ${inputs.topic}\n**Audience:** ${inputs.audience || 'General subscribers'}\n**Style:** ${inputs.style || 'Short & punchy'}\n**Regular Sections:** ${inputs.sections || 'None'}\n\nCreate the full newsletter with subject lines, preview text, and complete body.`,
      },

          { id: 'colors', label: 'Preferred Colors (optional)', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Deep blue and gold, or earthy tones' },

content.text:
Render hace el deploy automáticamente cuando haces push a GitHub. Solo ejecuta:

```bash
git add server/routes/categoryPrompts.js
git commit -m "Add instagram-carousel tool to backend categoryPrompts"
git push
```

Render detectará el push y desplegará solo.

bien, ahora quiero que agreges dentro de la categoría de content una nueva herramienta que su función es transcriptor de vídeo al adjuntar el enlace de la red social.

content.thinking:
The user wants to add a new tool in the "content" category that transcribes video by attaching a social media link. I need to add this to both `categories.js` (frontend) and `categoryPrompts.js` (backend).

Let me first understand how the existing tools work, especially ones that handle URLs or external inputs. Let me also check how the n8n integration works for tools that might require external processing.

The video transcription tool would need to:
1. Accept a video URL (from social media like YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, etc.)


2. Transcribe the video content
3. Return the transcription

Since Claude can't directly download and transcribe videos from URLs, I'll need to check if there's an n8n workflow or third-party API integration already in place for handling external services like this.

content.text: Antes de añadirlo, necesito entender cómo funcionan las herramientas con inputs especiales (como URLs o medios externos) para implementarlo correctamente.

content.thinking:
I see that the backend uses Claude (Anthropic) for AI generation. The issue with a "video transcriber" tool is that Claude can't actually download or access URLs of videos. It can't transcribe videos just from a URL.

However, Claude can be given a URL and asked to "transcribe" it in a limited way - but this won't actually work for video transcription from social media links since Claude doesn't have internet access.

The real options for video transcription would be:
1. Use an n8n workflow that calls a transcription API (like AssemblyAI, Whisper, etc.)


2. Use YouTube's transcript API for YouTube videos
3. Use a different approach

I should check if there's an n8n integration or webhook setup in the project that could handle this. Looking back at what the user asked - they want to attach a social media link, which means a URL input field. But for actual transcription, Claude can't access URLs directly. The existing tools all rely on Claude for generation, so a transcriber tool would be limited - Claude could discuss what's at a URL based on its training knowledge, but can't actually transcribe video content. I need to reconsider what the user is really asking for here.

Actually, I think they want a workflow where the user pastes a video URL, some service retrieves the transcript, and then Claude processes it. I noticed there's an n8n tool mentioned in recent commits about fixing error handling and token limits, which suggests there's already an n8n integration I can leverage. Let me check the server routes to see what's available.

content.text: Veo que el backend solo usa Claude directamente. Un transcriptor real de vídeo necesita un servicio externo. Déjame ver si ya hay integración con n8n u otros servicios:

content.thinking:
I see there's an n8n workflow tool but it's only for generating n8n workflow JSON, not for actually calling n8n webhooks. 

For a real video transcription tool, Claude can't actually access URLs and transcribe videos. The transcription would require:
1. A YouTube/TikTok/Instagram download service
2. A speech-to-text service (Whisper, AssemblyAI, etc.)

However, looking at this from a practical standpoint, I should tell the user about this limitation. The tool could:
1. Show a URL input
2. Send the URL to Claude asking it to analyze/transcribe (but Claude can't actually access URLs in real-time)


3. Alternatively, I could use a backend route to download and process videos, but that requires additional services

I notice YouTube actually exposes transcripts through an npm package, which could work for that platform specifically. For other social networks it gets much harder. I should be upfront with the user about these technical constraints and ask how they'd like to proceed, since the current setup is Claude-only and can't actually handle video transcription without external infrastructure.

content.text:
Aquí hay un problema técnico importante que debes saber antes de implementar esto.

**El problema:** Claude no puede acceder a URLs en tiempo real. Si solo usamos el sistema actual (Claude vía `/api/ai/generate`), Claude recibiría la URL pero **no podría descargar ni transcribir el vídeo**.

Para que funcione de verdad necesitas una de estas opciones:

---

**Opción A — Solo YouTube (más simple)**
Añadir una nueva ruta en el backend que use el paquete `youtube-transcript` para obtener los subtítulos/captions de YouTube automáticamente, y luego Claude los formatea/limpia. Solo funciona con YouTube y vídeos que tengan subtítulos activados.

**Opción B — Cualquier red social (más compleja)**
Usar un servicio externo de transcripción como AssemblyAI o Deepgram: el backend descarga el audio del vídeo y lo envía a la API de transcripción. Requiere configurar API keys adicionales y tiene coste.

**Opción C — El usuario pega el texto**
La tool más sencilla: el usuario copia y pega el texto/subtítulos del vídeo y Claude lo formatea, limpia, resume, y estructura. Sin llamadas externas, funciona con cualquier plataforma.

---

¿Cuál prefieres? La **Opción A** es la más rápida de implementar y cubre el caso de uso más común. La **Opción C** funciona hoy mismo sin infraestructura adicional.

lastPrompt: bien, ahora quiero que agreges dentro de la categoría de content una nueva herramienta que su función es transcriptor de vídeo al adjuntar el enlace de la red social.
